# Session Summary: 2026-04-25

**Project:** Tropical Architecture Initiative  
**Branch:** main  
**Date:** 2026-04-25

## Context
Creating Obsidian memory vault for the Tropical Architecture Initiative web project.

## Work Done
1. Analyzed entire project structure
   - 7 HTML pages (index, about, product-solutions, design-solutions, research, network, contact)
   - 3 JavaScript files (news-scraper.js, news-display.js, script.js)
   - 1 CSS file (styles.css)
   - 1 JSON data file (news-data.json)
   - 1 package.json

2. Created comprehensive memory vault at `.obsidian/`
   - Project overview with all entry points
   - 8 component notes (pages + core modules)
   - 2 pattern notes (Brutalist Grid, News Aggregator)
   - 3 domain notes (JavaScript, Web Development, Architecture)
   - Index files for projects and domains
   - Active TODOs and Session Log

3. Documented relationships via wikilinks
   - Pages linked to Design System
   - Components linked to project
   - Domains linked back to project

## Discoveries
- News scraper uses RSS feeds from ArchDaily and Dezeen
- Design follows brutalist grid aesthetic (12-column)
- Project has revenue model through physical products ($4,500 Modular Stilt Foundation)
- Jakarta is the only active pilot site

## Decisions
- Created vault at `.obsidian/` directory within project
- Used Obsidian-compatible markdown with wikilinks
- Organized by: projects > components/patterns/architecture, domains, sessions, todos

## Next Steps
- Review news-data.json structure
- Consider adding architect quotes database to memory
- Monitor if vault structure needs adjustment
